findings.claim: ADR 0003 treats kysely, pinned to 0.28.17 via package.json overrides, as a live/current dependency premise.

citations.quote: Pin kysely to 0.28.17 via package.json overrides.

findings.consequence: If kysely is no longer pinned at 0.28.17 in package.json (e.g. upgraded past the landmine, or Better Auth's dependency changed), this record's decision premise has decayed and should be reconfirmed against the manifest.

findings.claim: ADR 0003 treats src/lib/auth.ts as a live file path where createAuth(env) is constructed.

citations.quote: constructed per request via a createAuth(env) factory in src/lib/auth.ts

findings.consequence: If src/lib/auth.ts no longer exists or has moved, the record's concrete premise about the factory location has decayed.

findings.claim: ADR 0005 treats src/lib/sfnt.ts (fixSfntChecksums) as a live file path implementing checksum repair.

citations.quote: repair every SFNT table checksum plus head.checkSumAdjustment (src/lib/sfnt.ts fixSfntChecksums) before the woff2 wrap

findings.consequence: If src/lib/sfnt.ts has been removed, renamed, or the function relocated, this concrete premise no longer resolves.

findings.claim: ADR 0007 treats astro.config.mjs (injecting __ENGINE_V__) as a live file path implementing the cache-bust token.

citations.quote: Derive the engine ?v= cache-bust token from a content hash of the engine bytes at build time (astro.config.mjs injects __ENGINE_V__).

findings.consequence: If astro.config.mjs no longer performs this injection or has been removed, the premise has decayed.

findings.claim: ADR 0007 treats font-engine-worker.js as a live file/module that reads the ?v cache-bust token off its own URL.

citations.quote: have font-engine-worker.js read the ?v off its own URL (self.location.search) and reuse it for all importScripts

findings.consequence: If font-engine-worker.js no longer exists at that path or no longer implements this behavior, the premise has decayed.

findings.claim: ADR 0008 references guessCharsetFromRows as a live named function/module implementing charset fallback.

citations.quote: fall back to guessCharsetFromRows, which places rows by position

findings.consequence: guessCharsetFromRows is named as a function, not a package or file path per the strict concrete definition; flagged for review but likely below the bar since it's a function name not a file/module path.

findings.claim: ADR 0010 treats font-engine-gpos.js as a live vendored engine file implementing the GPOS PairPos writer.

citations.quote: write auto-kerning as a GPOS PairPos table via a new font-engine-gpos.js writer fed by a silhouette analyzer

findings.consequence: If font-engine-gpos.js no longer exists at that path, this concrete premise about the writer's location has decayed.

findings.claim: ADR 0013 treats a ~100 bound-parameter limit and chunking at 50 as a live constraint on D1, but this is a configuration/limit, not a package or path, so not concrete under this check's definition.

citations.quote: chunking IN-lists at 50 to stay under D1's bound-parameter limit

findings.consequence: Not applicable as a concrete premise per check definition; excluded from findings.
